2020 in Legacy Fighting Alliance
Information
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
First date airedJanuary 17, 2020 (2020-01-17)
Last date airedDecember 4, 2020 (2020-12-04)
← 2019
2021 →

2020 was the fourth year in the history of Legacy Fighting Alliance, a mixed martial arts promotion based in the United States.[1]

Event list

[edit]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 80: Garcia vs. Marsical

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 80: Garcia vs. Marsical
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 17, 2020
VenueRoute 66 Casino Hotel
CityAlbuquerque, New Mexico, U.S.
Event chronology
Legacy Fighting Alliance 79: Royval vs. Williams Legacy Fighting Alliance 80: Garcia vs. Marsical Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa

Legacy Fighting Alliance 80: Garcia vs. Marsical was the eighty-first event of Legacy Fighting Alliance and took place on January 17, 2020. It aired on UFC Fight Pass.[2][3]

Results

Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Steve Garcia def. Jose Mariscal TKO (punches) 2 2:27
Flyweight Jerome Rivera def. Kendrick Latchman Submission (triangle choke) 2 4:12
Lightweight Carrington Banks def. Chris Brown Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight Toninho Gavinho def. Josh Marsh Decision (split) 3 5:00
Middleweight Jordan Wright def. Gabriel Checco TKO (knees and punches) 2 0:48
Welterweight Tyler Ray def. Josh Streacker Submission (rear-naked choke) 2 3:01
Featherweight Sean William Cerveny def. Edwin Cooper Jr. Submission (armbar) 1 4:25
Preliminary Card
Flyweight Josiah Reyes def. Ricky Esquibel Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 4:25
Bantamweight Caleb Ramirez def. Chris Rojas Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight (175 lbs) Jalin Fuller def. Gabe Rodriguez TKO (punches) 1 0:13
Amateur Bouts
Heavyweight Mario Moore def. Dwight Maters KO (punch) 1 0:37
Lightweight Ty Miller def. Caleb Gunter TKO (punches) 2 2:52

[4]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa

[edit]
Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa
PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance
DateJanuary 31, 2020
VenueCosta Mesa Hall at the OC Fair & Event Center
CityCosta Mesa, California, U.S.
Event chronology
Legacy Fighting Alliance 80: Garcia vs. Marsical Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa Legacy Fighting Alliance 82: Polizzi vs. Pogues

Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa was the eighty-second event of Legacy Fighting Alliance and took place on January 31, 2020. It aired on UFC Fight Pass.[3][5]

Results

Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Featherweight Jamall Emmers def. Rafael Barbosa Submission (arm-triangle choke) 3 2:39
Catchweight (160 lbs) Jacob Rosales def. Salaiman Ahmadyar Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight Christian Aguilera def. Gláucio Eliziário Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Women's Flyweight Sam Hughes def. Lisa Mauldin Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight Vincent Cachero def. Marvin Garcia TKO (punches) 2 1:22
Bantamweight Leandro Gomes def. Yuma Horiuchi Decision (split) 3 5:00
Women's Strawweight Vanessa Demopoulos def. Loveth Young Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Preliminary Card (Amateur Bouts)
Welterweight Alexander Cruz def. Robert Pearlman Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Featherweight Jota Ninomiya def. Quincy Holland Decision (split) 3 3:00
Lightweight Bryant Shell def. Joshua Dell Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Welterweight Jeffrey Craig def. David Rivera Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Postliminary Card
Lightweight Carlos Figueroa def. Lance Lee KO (punch) 1 3:15
Featherweight Geoffrey Mellor def. Nick Badis Submission (rear-naked choke) 1 2:45

[6]

Legacy Fighting Alliance 82: Polizzi vs. Pogues

[edit]

PromotionLegacy Fighting Alliance

VenueMystic Lake Casino Hotel
CityPrior Lake, Minnesota, U.S.
Event chronology
Legacy Fighting Alliance 81: Emmers vs. Barbosa Legacy Fighting Alliance 82: Polizzi vs. Pogues Legacy Fighting Alliance 83: Jackson vs. Chaulet

Results

Main Card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes

Heavyweight Thomas Petersen def. Brian Peterson TKO (punches) 1 1:52
Preliminary Card

Featherweight Christian Rodriguez def. Jason Huntley TKO (knee and punches) 1 4:50
Amateur Bouts
Lightweight Jordan Clark def. Nick Kaaze Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight (200 lbs) Wesley Schultz def. Jackson McVey Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight (175 lbs) Joshua Fleck def. Manatua Lemaire Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00

Bantamweight Trevor Schultz def. Andre Sellars Submission (triangle choke) 2 1:58
Bantamweight Abubakar Adamu def. Eimar Hernandez Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
  1. ^ For the vacant LFA Light Heavyweight Championship.
